LAND OF THUNDER DRAGON

A peaceful himalaya kingdom known for happiness and natural beauty

About bhutan

Bhutan is a small, landlocked country in South Asia located in the Eastern Himalayas. It shares borders with China and India and is famous for its breathtaking mountain landscapes, ancient monasteries, and strong Buddhist traditions. Unlike many countries that measure success by economic growth alone, Bhutan follows a unique philosophy called Gross National Happiness (GNH), which focuses on the well-being and happiness of its people. The country carefully protects its environment, culture, and traditions. Visitors from around the world travel to Bhutan to experience its peaceful atmosphere, scenic valleys, and colorful festivals. The capital city, Thimphu, blends modern development with traditional architecture, making Bhutan one of the most unique destinations in the world.

Famous places in Bhutan

  • Paro takstang (tiger nest)
  • Thimphu capital city
  • Punakha dzhong
  • Dochula pass
